children.heading: Fair crop acreage bases and farm program payment yields
children.label: a Fair crop acreage bases and farm program payment yields
children.text: If the Secretary of Agriculture determines that crop acreage bases or farm program payment yields established for farms owned or operated by socially disadvantaged producers are not established in accordance with title V of the Agricultural Act of 1949 ( et seq.), the Secretary shall adjust the bases and yields to conform to the requirements of such title and make available any appropriate commodity program benefits.7 U.S.C. 1461

children.heading: Fair application of Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act
children.label: b Fair application of Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act
children.text: If the Secretary of Agriculture determines that application of the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act ( et seq.) with respect to socially disadvantaged producers is not consistent with the requirements of such Act, the Secretary shall make such changes in the administration of such Act as the Secretary considers necessary to provide for the fair and equitable treatment of socially disadvantaged producers under such Act.7 U.S.C. 1921

children.heading: Report on treatment of socially disadvantaged producers
children.label: c Report on treatment of socially disadvantaged producers
A
children.text: whether socially disadvantaged producers are underrepresented on State, county, area, or local committees established under or local review committees established under because of racial, ethnic, or gender prejudice; andsection 590h(b)(5) of title 16section 1363 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: if such underrepresentation exists, whether it inhibits or interferes with the participation of socially disadvantaged producers in programs of the Department of Agriculture.

children.heading: Submission of report
children.label: 2 Submission of report
children.text: Not later than , the Comptroller General shall submit the report required by this subsection to the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate.February 1, 1995

children.heading: “Socially disadvantaged producer” defined
children.label: d “Socially disadvantaged producer” defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “socially disadvantaged producer” means a producer who is a member of a group whose members have been subjected to racial, ethnic, or gender prejudice because of their identity as members of a group without regard to their individual qualities.
